basics.name: Jay Wilson
basics.label: Software Developer
basics.summary: Software developer with 5+ years of experience building high-quality iOS applications and full-stack web solutions. Specializes in Swift, SwiftUI, and modern web technologies. Proven track record of architecting scalable applications, implementing offline-first architectures, and delivering features that prioritize exceptional user experience and data security.

work.name: Matter Neuroscience
highlights: Featured as App of the Day on the Apple App Store (2025)
Architected and maintained iOS application implementing photo journaling features with AI-powered happiness insights
Engineered end-to-end encrypted photo storage system using on-device encryption with AWS S3 backend, ensuring user privacy and data security
Integrated on-device Core ML models for advanced image processing, reducing server costs while maintaining user privacy through local computation
Designed offline-first architecture using Core Data and CloudKit synchronization, ensuring seamless user experience across devices with 99.9% data consistency
Automated user engagement pipeline using Supabase edge functions and Mailchimp integration, contributing to improved trial-to-paid conversions

work.name: Homeward
highlights: Developed and optimized company website using Webflow, improving page load times and user experience
Collaborated cross-functionally with design and marketing teams to implement A/B tests using Google Optimize, driving data-driven decisions that improved conversion rates
Enhanced customer-facing web application using React and Material UI, implementing responsive components with styled-components architecture

work.name: CCT Plus LLC
highlights: Extended functionality of production iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI, delivering features for client projects on schedule
Architected full-stack applications leveraging Firebase for authentication and real-time data storage, reducing backend development time
Developed type-safe web applications using React, TypeScript, and Material UI, ensuring code quality and maintainability

work.name: Electronic Theatre Controls
highlights: Delivered critical technical support for live production environments, maintaining high customer satisfaction during high-pressure situations
Implemented and scaled knowledge management system, reducing support ticket resolution time and improving team efficiency
Developed comprehensive training curriculum for Hog 4 console platform, enabling customers to maximize product utilization
Delivered technical training programs both virtually and on-site, successfully onboarding customers annually
Built React-based web tools for fixture configuration downloads, streamlining customer workflow and reducing support inquiries
work.slogan: Lighting and automation control systems for live events and entertainment.

awards.title: 5th Place - OneSignal Boost Award
awards.summary: Placed 5th out of over 800 entries for Camp Notes in the OneSignal integration category of Shipaton

awards.title: App of the Day
awards.summary: Matter Neuroscience iOS app featured as App of the Day

projects.name: Camp Notes
projects.description: Camp Notes helps you remember the best campsites, share experiences with friends, and discover new outdoor destinations with detailed site-level tracking.

projects.name: iHog
projects.description: Turns an iOS Device into an OSC remote for Hog 4 consoles
